meta.title: Full-Stack Web Engineering, Nuxt, Next.js & Node
meta.description: Senior full-stack web engineer with 7+ years shipping production web products end-to-end - Nuxt 3, Next.js, React, Vue, Node / Express, and the AWS + Docker delivery pipeline behind them.

hero.title: Full-Stack Web Engineering
hero.description: 7+ years shipping production web products end-to-end in TypeScript - Nuxt 3 and Next.js on the front, Node / Express on the back, and the AWS + Docker delivery pipeline tying it together. This page tracks the web engineering work itself: typed boundaries from DB to UI, component patterns that hold up as features pile on, and the freelance and open-source builds along the way.

items: Type-safe API boundaries from DB to UI in TypeScript
Nuxt 3 / Vue 3 and Next.js / React component patterns at scale
Node / Express services with WebSocket real-time delivery
AWS, Docker, Kubernetes, and Jenkins CI/CD pipelines
Production observability with Sentry, Google Analytics, and Amplitude

tools.name: FreeConvert
tools.description: One of the top-ranked SaaS platforms for online file conversion, compression, and transcoding. Frontend in Nuxt 3, backend services in Node / Express, real-time progress over WebSocket, deployed on AWS + Kubernetes + Cloudflare. Millions of conversions a month.

tools.name: ProPDF
tools.description: An in-browser PDF editor shipped as a new SaaS product in the TransMedia suite. Set up the Jenkins + Docker CI/CD pipeline from scratch and built the feature-rich editing surface end-to-end.

tools.name: EnviroConfig
tools.description: Env-config and schema validation for Node. Catches misconfigured deployments at boot so production never gets surprised by a missing key. Multi-environment defaults baked in.

tools.name: node-express-rate-limiter
tools.description: An Express.js rate-limiting middleware with customizable rules, IP whitelisting, Redis-backed counters, and burst handling. Built for real production traffic, not just demos.

tools.name: vue3-counter
tools.description: A highly customizable numeric counter component for Vue 3 with flexible layouts, styling options, and full TypeScript support. Small surface area, real ergonomics.

tools.name: ProPassword
tools.description: A privacy-first, client-side password generator with phrase-based generation, entropy analysis, and multi-language support. Built with Next.js, TypeScript, Redux Toolkit, and Tailwind.
